meta.repo_status: draft-only; not created live by DIG-40
meta.required_review: manual notification-only run before cron or writeback

nodes.name: Set Runtime Config
nodes.notes: Keep emit_raw_records=false and allow_sends_or_mutations=false. Dedicated n8n credential/env EMAILIT_API_KEY_AUTOMATION is required before production scheduling.

nodes.name: Emailit Domains Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Summarize domain health metadata only. Do not emit domain names, DNS records, verification tokens, or raw records.

nodes.name: Emailit Events Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Summarize event counts/status buckets only. Do not emit recipient addresses, subjects, message bodies, or raw payloads.

nodes.name: Emailit Templates Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Summarize template count/schema only. Do not emit template HTML/text/body or customer-specific content.

nodes.name: Emailit Webhooks Summary (GET only, optional)
nodes.notes: Metadata/status only. Do not emit webhook URLs, signing secrets, or payload samples. Do not create/update webhooks.

nodes.name: Normalize Data-Minimized Results
nodes.notes: Drops samples/raw bodies and keeps only aggregate connector health fields.

nodes.name: Build Operator Digest
nodes.notes: Digest is safe for notification after manual review.

nodes.name: Notify Operator (configure credential)
nodes.notes: Replace with Email/Slack/Discord node after credential setup. Keep Cron, Paperclip, and GitHub writeback disabled until a notification-only run is reviewed.
